titleStmt.title: The Representative in Hungary ( Schoenfeld ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Representative in Hungary ( Schoenfeld ) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
648. General KeyMaj. Gen. William S. Key, Chief of the United States Military Representation on the Allied Control Commission for Hungary. in ACC (Allied Control Commission) meeting September 24 raised question of eviction of Hungarians from Czechoslovakia and Rumania. VoroshilovMarshal of the Soviet Union Kliment Yefremovich Voroshilov, Chairman of the Soviet Element of the Allied Control Commission for Hungary. stated he had received many complaints from Hungarians copies of which I have been sending
Department but that in his opinion, they were based on rumors and did not have factual basis.
Voroshilov had forwarded notes to local CzechDalibor Krno, Czechoslovak Representative in Hungary. and Rumanian representatives. Presumably Russians here are taking no further action in matter.
Repeated to Moscow as 77, to Praha as 10 and to Bucharest as 26.
